properties.name: Board Lifecycle
properties.description: All operations that govern board discovery, opening, canvas editing, saving, synchronization status, regeneration from the graph, and markdown rendering.

properties.name: Project Management
properties.description: Operations against the project registry (~/.nacl/projects.json): listing all registered projects, reading the active project with resolved config, and switching the active project.

properties.name: Skill Orchestration
properties.description: Triggering individual and batch NaCl skill runs (regenerate/sync/analyze), monitoring Pacer throughput, and browsing the run ring-buffer.

properties.name: Snapshot Management
properties.description: Automatic and on-demand board snapshots: capture, list, diff against current or another timestamp, and restore.

properties.name: Search and Discovery
properties.description: Full-text search spanning board elements and graph nodes; build identity verification via the version endpoint.
